The extension only accesses the DOM (Document Object Model) of the currently active tab when you initiate an automation task.No browsing history is collected or stored beyond the current sessionDOM data is analyzed locally and discarded after each automation stepNo personal information is harvested from pages you visitData StorageAll settings and data are stored locally in Chrome's extension storage. FSB uses AES-GCM encryption for sensitive data like API keys.Configuration is stored in chrome.storage.localAPI keys are encrypted before storage using AES-GCMSession logs are stored locally and can be cleared at any timeAnalytics data (task counts, success rates) stays on your deviceExternal ServicesFSB communicates with external AI providers only when you configure and use them. The choice of provider and what data is sent is under your control.API calls are made only to the provider you select (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google)Sent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action contextNo data is sent to FSB servers -- there are noneEach provider has their own privacy policy governing how they handle API requestsNo TrackingFSB does not include any analytics, telemetry, or tracking services. There are no cookies, no fingerprinting, and no third-party scripts beyond the AI provider APIs you explicitly configure.API KeysYour API keys are encrypted locally using AES-GCM before being stored. They are never transmitted anywhere except to the AI provider you configured, and only as authentication headers in API requests.Keys are encrypted at rest in Chrome storageDecryption only happens in-memory when making API callsKeys are never logged, exported, or sharedAuto-Passwords BetaFSB includes an optional credential manager that stores login credentials encrypted on your device. Passwords are never exposed to AI models -- they are filled directly into pages by the content script, bypassing the AI entirely.Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with 256-bit keys and PBKDF2 key derivationWhen the AI analyzes a page, password field values are replaced with [hidden] -- the actual password is never included in any AI promptAuto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flowThe credential list view only shows usernames and domains -- passwords are decrypted individually and only when needed for auto-fillCredentials are stored per-domain with parent domain fallback (e.g., accounts.google.com inherits from google.com)Prompt Injection PreventionWeb pages can contain hidden text designed to hijack AI agents. FSB implements multi-layered defenses to ensure the AI only follows your instructions, never instructions embedded in page content.All page content is wrapped in [PAGE_CONTENT] boundary markers, and the AI is instructed to never follow instructions found within these markersA sanitization engine strips known injection patterns (e.g., "ignore previous instructions", fake system prompts, override attempts) from all page content before it reaches the AIAI-generated actions are validated before execution -- dangerous URLs (javascript:, data:) and script injection attempts are blockedOnly a strict allowlist of 30+ known tools can be executed -- the AI cannot invent or call arbitrary actionsContent size is capped (500 chars per value, 15K total prompt cap) to limit payload deliveryInvisible Unicode control characters that websites embed are stripped before processingOpen SourceFSB is fully open source under the MIT License. You can audit every line of code to verify these privacy claims. The source code is available on GitHub.View the source code on GitHubSummaryFSB processes data locally, encrypts sensitive information, never exposes passwords to AI models, defends against prompt injection attacks, communicates only with AI providers you choose, includes no tracking, and is fully auditable as open source software.

trans-unit.source: TLDR: FSB operates entirely within your browser. No browsing data is collected by FSB servers, and AI calls go directly from your browser to the provider you choose. API keys are encrypted locally with AES-GCM, and memory data stays on your device. The only data that ever leaves your machine for FSB is opt-out anonymous usage telemetry that powers the public /stats page. If you pair Remote Dashboard, transient live-preview frames can pass through the relay during the session, but they are not stored. Everything is open source and auditable.
trans-unit.target: TLDR: FSB operates entirely within your browser. No browsing data is collected by FSB servers, and AI calls go directly from your browser to the provider you choose. API keys are encrypted locally with AES-GCM, and memory data stays on your device. The only data that ever leaves your machine for FSB is opt-out anonymous usage telemetry that powers the public /stats page. If you pair Remote Dashboard, transient live-preview frames can pass through the relay during the session, but they are not stored. Everything is open source and auditable.

trans-unit.source: FSB operates entirely within your browser. When you initiate an automation task, the extension may inspect the active tab's DOM (Document Object Model) and, when you invoke a capability, make same-origin site API requests from your browser session.
trans-unit.target: FSB operates entirely within your browser. When you initiate an automation task, the extension may inspect the active tab's DOM (Document Object Model) and, when you invoke a capability, make same-origin site API requests from your browser session.

trans-unit.source: No browsing history is collected or stored beyond the current session
trans-unit.target: 不收集或儲存當前會話之外的任何瀏覽歷史

trans-unit.source: DOM data and site API results are analyzed locally and discarded after each automation step unless you explicitly save them in memory
trans-unit.target: DOM data and site API results are analyzed locally and discarded after each automation step unless you explicitly save them in memory

trans-unit.source: No personal information is harvested from pages you visit
trans-unit.target: 不從你訪問的頁面採集任何個人資訊

trans-unit.source: FSB's capability layer can call a site's own first-party API from the page context, using your already-authenticated browser session. These requests run locally in Chrome; first-party cookies or site auth may be attached by the browser for that target site, but FSB does not return, store, log, or send cookies, tokens, CSRF values, request bodies, or response bodies to FSB servers.
trans-unit.target: FSB's capability layer can call a site's own first-party API from the page context, using your already-authenticated browser session. These requests run locally in Chrome; first-party cookies or site auth may be attached by the browser for that target site, but FSB does not return, store, log, or send cookies, tokens, CSRF values, request bodies, or response bodies to FSB servers.

trans-unit.source: Capability invocations follow FSB's consent controls and are recorded only in the redacted local audit log: origin, capability slug, method, side-effect class, consent decision, and outcome. The audit log never stores invocation arguments, request bodies, response bodies, cookies, tokens, CSRF values, or site response payloads.
trans-unit.target: Capability invocations follow FSB's consent controls and are recorded only in the redacted local audit log: origin, capability slug, method, side-effect class, consent decision, and outcome. The audit log never stores invocation arguments, request bodies, response bodies, cookies, tokens, CSRF values, or site response payloads.
FSB 請求的 Chrome 權限

trans-unit.source: To run web automation, FSB declares the following permissions in its Chrome manifest. Each is used only for the documented purpose; nothing is sent off-device on the strength of any of them.
trans-unit.target: 為了執行網頁自動化，FSB 在其 Chrome 資訊清單中宣告以下權限。每項僅用於其記錄的用途；不會以任何一項為依據將資料傳送至裝置外。

trans-unit.source: DOM and tabs, activeTab, scripting, tabs, windows, sidePanel, and host permission <all_urls>: read and write the active tab, inject the automation content script, list and switch tabs, and render the side panel
trans-unit.target: DOM and tabs, activeTab, scripting, tabs, windows, sidePanel, and host permission <all_urls>: read and write the active tab, inject the automation content script, list and switch tabs, and render the side panel

trans-unit.source: Advanced automation, debugger: attach the Chrome DevTools Protocol for coordinate-based clicks, drag, and key-hold actions that the regular DOM API cannot perform. webNavigation: observe navigation start/finish events so automation waits for the right moment
trans-unit.target: Advanced automation, debugger: attach the Chrome DevTools Protocol for coordinate-based clicks, drag, and key-hold actions that the regular DOM API cannot perform. webNavigation: observe navigation start/finish events so automation waits for the right moment

trans-unit.source: Local storage, storage, unlimitedStorage: store your settings, credentials, payment methods, and memory in chrome.storage.local on your device. Unlimited storage lifts the default 10 MB quota so memory and session logs can grow without hitting a wall
trans-unit.target: Local storage, storage, unlimitedStorage: store your settings, credentials, payment methods, and memory in chrome.storage.local on your device. Unlimited storage lifts the default 10 MB quota so memory and session logs can grow without hitting a wall

trans-unit.source: UX helpers, clipboardWrite: write copy-to-clipboard results from automation. alarms: schedule background housekeeping. offscreen: host the speech-to-text recorder in a hidden document because service workers cannot capture audio directly
trans-unit.target: UX helpers, clipboardWrite: write copy-to-clipboard results from automation. alarms: schedule background housekeeping. offscreen: host the speech-to-text recorder in a hidden document because service workers cannot capture audio directly

trans-unit.source: Microphone access for speech-to-text is not declared in the manifest. Chrome shows its own permission prompt the first time you use the mic button.
trans-unit.target: 語音轉文字所需的麥克風存取權限未在資訊清單中宣告。當你首次使用麥克風按鈕時，Chrome 會自行顯示權限提示。

trans-unit.source: All settings and data are stored locally in Chrome's extension storage. FSB uses AES-GCM encryption for sensitive data like API keys.
trans-unit.target: 所有設定和資料都儲存在 Chrome 擴充套件的本地儲存中。FSB 對 API Key 等敏感資料使用 AES-GCM 加密。
配置儲存在 chrome.storage.local 中

trans-unit.source: API keys are encrypted before storage using AES-GCM
trans-unit.target: API Key 在儲存前會使用 AES-GCM 加密

trans-unit.source: Session logs are stored locally and can be cleared at any time
trans-unit.target: 會話日誌儲存在本地，可隨時清除

trans-unit.source: Analytics data (task counts, success rates) stays on your device
trans-unit.target: 分析資料（任務計數、成功率）保留在你的裝置上

trans-unit.source: FSB communicates with external AI providers only when you configure and use a hosted provider. If you use LM Studio, AI requests stay on your machine through its local OpenAI-compatible server. The choice of provider and what data is sent is under your control.
trans-unit.target: FSB 僅在你配置並使用託管提供商時，才與外部 AI 提供商通訊。如果你使用 LM Studio，AI 請求會透過其本地 OpenAI 相容伺服器留在本機。提供商選擇與傳送的資料完全由你掌控。

trans-unit.source: Hosted API calls are made only to the provider you select (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or OpenRouter)
trans-unit.target: 託管 API 呼叫只會發往你選擇的提供商（xAI、OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 或 OpenRouter)

trans-unit.source: LM Studio uses a local OpenAI-compatible server on your device and does not require an API key
trans-unit.target: LM Studio 在你的裝置上使用本地 OpenAI 相容伺服器，且無需 API Key

trans-unit.source: Sent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action context
trans-unit.target: Sent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action context

trans-unit.source: If you pair Remote Dashboard or use legacy Background Agents sync, an optional relay server handles WebSocket messages for that session. Live-preview frames may pass through the relay transiently, but page content, DOM data, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, and site API payloads are not persisted on the server. This is opt-in only
trans-unit.target: If you pair Remote Dashboard or use legacy Background Agents sync, an optional relay server handles WebSocket messages for that session. Live-preview frames may pass through the relay transiently, but page content, DOM data, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, and site API payloads are not persisted on the server. This is opt-in only

trans-unit.source: Each provider has their own privacy policy governing how they handle API requests
trans-unit.target: 每個提供商都有自己的隱私政策，規定其如何處理 API 請求

trans-unit.source: Remote Dashboard and PhantomStream Live Preview
trans-unit.target: Remote Dashboard and PhantomStream Live Preview

trans-unit.source: When you pair Remote Dashboard, FSB can show a live preview of the active browser tab using PhantomStream. The preview streams structured DOM data instead of pixels: an initial snapshot, MutationObserver diffs, scroll position, automation overlays, dialog state, media playback state, and remote-control messages over WebSocket.
trans-unit.target: When you pair Remote Dashboard, FSB can show a live preview of the active browser tab using PhantomStream. The preview streams structured DOM data instead of pixels: an initial snapshot, MutationObserver diffs, scroll position, automation overlays, dialog state, media playback state, and remote-control messages over WebSocket.

trans-unit.source: The relay forwards those live-preview frames only to the paired dashboard session. FSB servers do not persist page DOM, page content, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, or site API payloads from the preview stream
trans-unit.target: The relay forwards those live-preview frames only to the paired dashboard session. FSB servers do not persist page DOM, page content, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, or site API payloads from the preview stream

trans-unit.source: FSB enables PhantomStream input masking (maskInputs: true), so passwords and form-control values are masked before they leave the captured page
trans-unit.target: FSB enables PhantomStream input masking (maskInputs: true), so passwords and form-control values are masked before they leave the captured page

trans-unit.source: The dashboard viewer renders mirrored content in a scriptless sandbox and sanitizes mirrored DOM and CSS before display
trans-unit.target: The dashboard viewer renders mirrored content in a scriptless sandbox and sanitizes mirrored DOM and CSS before display

trans-unit.source: Images, video, and audio are mirrored by reference in current dashboard mode. Media bytes do not cross the relay; the viewer may fetch allowed public HTTPS asset or media URLs directly, while private, internal, non-HTTPS, or otherwise blocked origins are replaced with placeholders by PhantomStream's fail-closed fetch policy
trans-unit.target: Images, video, and audio are mirrored by reference in current dashboard mode. Media bytes do not cross the relay; the viewer may fetch allowed public HTTPS asset or media URLs directly, while private, internal, non-HTTPS, or otherwise blocked origins are replaced with placeholders by PhantomStream's fail-closed fetch policy

trans-unit.source: FSB does not include any third-party analytics, ad trackers, or cross-site fingerprinting. There are no cookies and no third-party scripts beyond the AI provider APIs you explicitly configure. The one piece of first-party data FSB sends home is the opt-out Anonymous Usage Telemetry described below, used solely to power the public /stats dashboard.
trans-unit.target: FSB 不包含任何第三方分析、廣告追蹤器或跨站指紋識別。除你顯式設定的 AI 提供商 APIs 之外，沒有 Cookie，也沒有第三方指令碼。FSB 向自身傳送的唯一第一方資料是下方描述的可選退出的匿名使用遙測，僅用於驅動公開的 /stats 儀表板。

trans-unit.source: Your API keys are encrypted locally using AES-GCM before being stored. They are never transmitted anywhere except to the AI provider you configured, and only as authentication headers in API requests.
trans-unit.target: 你的 API Key 會在儲存前透過 AES-GCM 在本地加密。除了你配置的 AI 提供商之外，絕不會傳送到任何地方，且只在 API 請求的身份驗證頭中使用。

trans-unit.source: Keys are encrypted at rest in Chrome storage
trans-unit.target: Key 在 Chrome 儲存中以加密形式靜態儲存

trans-unit.source: Decryption only happens in-memory when making API calls
trans-unit.target: 僅在 API 呼叫時在記憶體中解密

trans-unit.source: Keys are never logged, exported, or shared
trans-unit.target: Key 絕不會被記錄、匯出或共享

trans-unit.source: FSB includes an optional credential manager that stores login credentials encrypted on your device. Passwords are never exposed to AI models. They are filled directly into pages by the content script, bypassing the AI entirely.
trans-unit.target: FSB 提供可選的憑據管理器，將登入憑據加密儲存到你的裝置。密碼不會暴露給 AI 模型，而是由內容指令碼直接填入頁面，完全繞過 AI。

trans-unit.source: Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with 256-bit keys and PBKDF2 key derivation
trans-unit.target: 憑據在靜態儲存時使用 256 位金鑰和 PBKDF2 派生金鑰的 AES-GCM 加密

trans-unit.source: When the AI analyzes a page, password field values are replaced with [hidden]. The actual password is never included in any AI prompt
trans-unit.target: AI 分析頁面時，密碼欄位的值會被替換為 [hidden]。真實密碼絕不會出現在任何 AI 提示中

trans-unit.source: Auto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flow
trans-unit.target: Auto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flow

trans-unit.source: The credential list view only shows usernames and domains. Passwords are decrypted individually and only when needed for auto-fill
trans-unit.target: 憑據列表檢視僅顯示使用者名稱和域名。密碼只在自動填充需要時單獨解密

trans-unit.source: Credentials are stored per-domain with parent domain fallback (e.g., accounts.google.com inherits from google.com)
trans-unit.target: 憑據按域名儲存，並具備父域回退（例如 accounts.google.com 會繼承 google.com)

trans-unit.source: FSB includes an optional payment-method vault that stores card details on your device for checkout auto-fill. Cards are treated with the same encryption and AI isolation as login credentials, and the full card number is never sent to any AI model.
trans-unit.target: FSB 包含一個可選的付款方式保險庫，將卡片資訊保存在你的裝置上以便結帳時自動填入。卡片採用與登入憑證相同的加密與 AI 隔離機制，完整的卡號絕不會傳送給任何 AI 模型。

trans-unit.source: Card details (number, expiry, cardholder, and zip) are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with the same vault-derived key used for credentials
trans-unit.target: 卡片資訊（卡號、有效期限、持卡人與郵遞區號）使用與憑證相同的保險庫衍生金鑰，透過 AES-GCM 在靜態時加密

trans-unit.source: When the AI analyzes a checkout page, any detected card-number field values are replaced with [hidden] before the prompt is built. Card numbers, CVV, and expiry are never included in any AI prompt
trans-unit.target: 當 AI 分析結帳頁面時，偵測到的卡號欄位值會在建立提示之前被替換為 [hidden]。卡號、CVV 和有效期限絕不會被納入任何 AI 提示之中

trans-unit.source: Auto-fill happens via the content script writing directly into the page's DOM fields, bypassing the AI entirely
trans-unit.target: 自動填入由內容指令碼直接寫入頁面的 DOM 欄位完成，完全繞過 AI

trans-unit.source: The list view shows only a card nickname and last-4 digits. Full numbers are decrypted in memory only at the moment of fill
trans-unit.target: 清單檢視僅顯示卡片暱稱與後 4 碼。完整卡號僅在填入的當下在記憶體中解密

trans-unit.source: An MCP client can request a payment fill via use_payment_method, but the user is shown an in-extension confirmation prompt before any card data is written into the page
trans-unit.target: MCP 用戶端可透過 use_payment_method 請求執行付款自動填入，但在任何卡片資料寫入頁面之前，會在擴充套件內向使用者顯示確認提示

trans-unit.source: CVV is never persisted unless you opt in per-card, and even then it is encrypted alongside the rest of the record
trans-unit.target: 除非你為某張卡片明確啟用，否則 CVV 永遠不會被持久保存；即使啟用，也會與紀錄的其餘部分一同加密

trans-unit.source: FSB includes an optional microphone input for the prompt box. The default provider runs entirely in your browser; an optional OpenAI Whisper fallback can be enabled in settings if you want higher accuracy.
trans-unit.target: FSB 在提示輸入框中包含一個可選的麥克風輸入。預設提供者完全在你的瀏覽器中執行；若你需要更高的準確性，可於設定中啟用可選的 OpenAI Whisper 後備方案。

trans-unit.source: Default provider: the browser's native SpeechRecognition API. Audio is processed by Chrome and never leaves your device through FSB
trans-unit.target: Default provider: the browser's native SpeechRecognition API. Audio is processed by Chrome and never leaves your device through FSB

trans-unit.source: Optional Whisper provider: when sttProvider is set to whisper and an OpenAI key is configured, recorded audio chunks are uploaded directly from your browser to OpenAI's transcription endpoint. FSB never sees or stores the audio
trans-unit.target: 可選的 Whisper 提供者：當 sttProvider 設定為 whisper 且已設定 OpenAI 金鑰時，錄製的音訊片段會從你的瀏覽器直接上傳到 OpenAI 的轉錄端點。FSB 從不查看或保存該音訊

trans-unit.source: The microphone is only active while you are holding or have toggled the mic button. Chrome prompts for permission the first time you use it; FSB does not request microphone access in the extension manifest
trans-unit.target: 麥克風僅在你按住或已切換開啟麥克風按鈕期間處於作用狀態。首次使用時 Chrome 會要求權限；FSB 不會在擴充套件資訊清單中要求麥克風存取權限

trans-unit.source: Transcripts are inserted into the prompt textarea only and are never logged, persisted, or transmitted outside the active AI request you choose to send
trans-unit.target: 轉錄結果僅插入到提示文字框中，絕不會在你選擇傳送的作用中 AI 請求之外被記錄、保存或傳輸

trans-unit.source: Disable speech entirely by leaving the mic button untouched, or by clearing the optional Whisper provider in Chrome extension storage
trans-unit.target: 透過不觸碰麥克風按鈕，或在 Chrome 擴充套件儲存中清除可選的 Whisper 提供者，即可完全停用語音功能

trans-unit.source: Web pages can contain hidden text designed to hijack AI agents. FSB implements multi-layered defenses to ensure the AI only follows your instructions, never instructions embedded in page content.
trans-unit.target: 網頁可能包含旨在劫持 AI 智慧體的隱藏文字。FSB 透過多層防禦確保 AI 只遵循你的指令，絕不執行嵌入在頁面內容中的指令。

trans-unit.source: All page content is wrapped in [PAGE_CONTENT] boundary markers, and the AI is instructed to never follow instructions found within these markers
trans-unit.target: 所有頁面內容都被包裹在 [PAGE_CONTENT] 邊界標記內，並指示 AI 永遠不要執行其中的指令

trans-unit.source: A sanitization engine strips known injection patterns (e.g., "ignore previous instructions", fake system prompts, override attempts) from all page content before it reaches the AI
trans-unit.target: 在內容到達 AI 之前，清洗引擎會剝離已知的注入模式（例如“忽略以上指令”、偽造的系統提示、覆蓋請求）

trans-unit.source: AI-generated actions are validated before execution. Dangerous URLs (javascript:, data:) and script injection attempts are blocked
trans-unit.target: AI 生成的動作會在執行前進行驗證。危險 URL（javascript:、data:）和指令碼注入嘗試將被阻止

trans-unit.source: Only a strict, fixed allowlist of known tools can be executed. The AI cannot invent or call arbitrary actions
trans-unit.target: Only a strict, fixed allowlist of known tools can be executed. The AI cannot invent or call arbitrary actions

trans-unit.source: Content size is capped (500 chars per value, 15K total prompt cap) to limit payload delivery
trans-unit.target: 內容大小有上限（單值 500 字元，提示總上限 15K），限制有效載荷投遞

trans-unit.source: Invisible Unicode control characters that websites embed are stripped before processing
trans-unit.target: 網站嵌入的不可見 Unicode 控制字元會在處理前被剝離
後臺智慧體與伺服器同步

trans-unit.source: Deprecated in v0.9.45rc1. FSB's built-in Background Agents have been superseded by OpenClaw and Claude Routines, with remote control now handled by the Sync tab. The disclosures below are retained for users still running v0.9.44 or earlier; on current builds the relay server is only contacted when you pair a Sync session.
trans-unit.target: Deprecated in v0.9.45rc1. FSB's built-in Background Agents have been superseded by OpenClaw and Claude Routines, with remote control now handled by the Sync tab. The disclosures below are retained for users still running v0.9.44 or earlier; on current builds the relay server is only contacted when you pair a Sync session.

trans-unit.source: If you opt into legacy Background Agents server sync or pair Remote Dashboard, a relay server facilitates communication between your extension and the dashboard.
trans-unit.target: If you opt into legacy Background Agents server sync or pair Remote Dashboard, a relay server facilitates communication between your extension and the dashboard.

trans-unit.source: The server stores: agent definitions (name, schedule, target URL), run metrics (token count, cost, duration, success/fail status), and session pairing tokens
trans-unit.target: 伺服器會儲存：智慧體定義（名稱、計劃、目標 URL）、執行指標（Token 數、成本、時長、成功/失敗狀態）、會話配對令牌

trans-unit.source: The server does NOT persist: page content, DOM data, browsing history, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, site API payloads, or other data from the pages you visit
trans-unit.target: The server does NOT persist: page content, DOM data, browsing history, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, site API payloads, or other data from the pages you visit

trans-unit.source: Authentication uses hash keys (generated locally) and session tokens that expire after 24 hours
trans-unit.target: 身份驗證使用本地生成的雜湊 Key，以及 24 小時後失效的會話令牌

trans-unit.source: One-time pairing tokens expire after 60 seconds and cannot be reused
trans-unit.target: 一次性配對令牌在 60 秒後失效，無法重複使用

trans-unit.source: Server sync is disabled by default. You must explicitly enable it in Options
trans-unit.target: 伺服器同步預設關閉，需要你在“選項”中顯式啟用

trans-unit.source: FSB's memory system stores navigation patterns and site intelligence to improve automation over time.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的記憶系統會沉澱導航模式和站點情報，讓自動化隨時間持續最佳化。

trans-unit.source: All memory data (semantic, episodic, procedural) is stored locally in chrome.storage.local
trans-unit.target: 所有記憶資料（語義、情景、過程）都儲存在 chrome.storage.local 中

trans-unit.source: No memory data is sent to any external server
trans-unit.target: 記憶資料不會傳送到任何外部伺服器

trans-unit.source: Memory can be viewed and cleared at any time from the Options dashboard
trans-unit.target: 你可在選項控制檯中隨時檢視並清除記憶

trans-unit.source: Site maps and navigation patterns are domain-specific and isolated from each other
trans-unit.target: 站點地圖和導航模式按域名隔離，互不影響

trans-unit.source: FSB v0.9.69 introduced an opt-out anonymous usage telemetry pipeline so the project can publish aggregate adoption numbers (see /stats) without ever touching the pages you browse. The only location signal is a coarse country/state label the server derives from your request IP at ingest (never from page content), kept only in aggregate — see Region (state-level) metric below. Telemetry is on by default but can be disabled with a single toggle, and the per-install data can be erased on request.
trans-unit.target: FSB v0.9.69 引入了一個可選擇退出的匿名使用情況遙測管道，讓專案可以發布彙總的採用數據（參見 /stats），且絕不觸及你瀏覽的頁面。唯一的位置訊號是伺服器在接收時從你的請求 IP 衍生出的粗略國家／州標籤（絕不來自頁面內容），且僅以彙總形式保留——參見下方的 地區（州級）指標。遙測預設開啟，但可透過單一開關停用，並且可應請求刪除每次安裝的數據。

trans-unit.source: A random per-install UUID stored in chrome.storage.local under the key fsbInstallUuid. The UUID is generated locally and never tied to your identity.
trans-unit.target: 每次安裝隨機產生的 UUID，儲存於 chrome.storage.local 的鍵 fsbInstallUuid 之下。UUID 於本機產生，永遠不會與你的身分關聯。

trans-unit.source: The name of the MCP client used (e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex), drawn from a fixed allowlist.
trans-unit.target: 所使用的 MCP 用戶端名稱（例如 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex），取自固定的允許清單。

trans-unit.source: The model name used for a session (e.g. grok-4-fast, claude-opus-4), drawn from a fixed allowlist.
trans-unit.target: 工作階段中使用的模型名稱（例如 grok-4-fast、claude-opus-4），取自固定的允許清單。

trans-unit.source: Aggregate input/output token counts per session.
trans-unit.target: 每個工作階段的輸入／輸出 token 數量聚合值。

trans-unit.source: The number of active FSB agents on your install (an integer count).
trans-unit.target: 你的安裝上活躍的 FSB 代理數量（一個整數值）。

trans-unit.source: Page URLs, hostnames, or browsing history.
trans-unit.target: 頁面 URLs、主機名稱或瀏覽歷史紀錄。

trans-unit.source: Prompts, instructions, task descriptions, or any natural-language text you send to your model provider.
trans-unit.target: 提示、指令、工作描述，或你傳送給模型供應商的任何自然語言文字。

trans-unit.source: Page DOM, screenshots, page content, site API payloads, or AI responses.
trans-unit.target: Page DOM, screenshots, page content, site API payloads, or AI responses.

trans-unit.source: Plaintext IP addresses. The server uses the request IP transiently and inline for exactly two purposes — a daily-rotating-salt hash for rate limiting, and deriving a coarse country/state label (see below) — then discards it immediately. The plaintext IP is never stored or logged.
trans-unit.target: 明文 IP 位址。伺服器僅出於兩個目的暫時且內聯地使用請求 IP——用於限流的每日輪換加鹽雜湊，以及衍生粗略的國家／州標籤（見下文）——隨後立即將其丟棄。明文 IP 絕不會被儲存或記錄。

trans-unit.source: Names, usernames, account handles, or any free-form identity fields.
trans-unit.target: 姓名、使用者名稱、帳號代號，或任何自由文字身分欄位。

trans-unit.source: Email addresses, phone numbers, or contact information.
trans-unit.target: 電子郵件地址、電話號碼，或聯絡資訊。

trans-unit.source: The server derives a coarse country and US-state (subdivision) label from your request IP at ingest, using a self-hosted DB-IPIP-to-City Lite dataset and our own lookup — not a live third-party geolocation service, and never MaxMind. The plaintext IP is consumed inline and discarded; only the derived label is kept.
trans-unit.target: 伺服器在接收時，使用自我託管的 DB-IP IP-to-City Lite 資料集和我們自己的查找邏輯，從你的請求 IP 衍生出粗略的國家和美國州（行政區）標籤——並非即時的第三方地理定位服務，也絕不是 MaxMind。明文 IP 會被內聯處理並丟棄；僅保留衍生出的標籤。

trans-unit.source: Region is stored only in the daily aggregate, behind a k≥5 anonymity floor: any state with fewer than 5 distinct installs on a given day collapses into a single “Other” bucket (suppressed entirely when even that combined count is below 5). No individual state label ever represents fewer than 5 installs.
trans-unit.target: 地區僅儲存在每日彙總中，且位於 k≥5 的匿名閾值之後：某一天內不同安裝數少於 5 的任何州都會合併到單一「Other」桶中（當該合併計數本身低於 5 時則完全抑制）。任何單一州標籤都絕不會代表少於 5 次安裝。

trans-unit.source: There is no per-install location profile. The coarse label lives only on the short-lived raw event (dropped by the 7-day retention) and in the k≥5-floored daily rollup; we never build or retain a durable mapping from your install to a place. Geolocation data is by DB-IP (https://db-ip.com).
trans-unit.target: 不存在按安裝的位置剖析。粗略標籤僅存在於短暫的原始事件（由 7 天保留策略刪除）和經 k≥5 過濾的每日彙總中；我們絕不建立或保留從你的安裝到某個地點的持久對應。地理定位數據來自 DB-IP（https://db-ip.com）。

trans-unit.source: Raw events are retained for 7 days. Daily rollups (one row per install per day) are retained for 365 days. Global aggregates (one row per day, no per-install dimension) are retained indefinitely so historical charts on /stats remain stable.
trans-unit.target: 原始事件保留 7 天。每日彙總（每安裝每天一列）保留 365 天。全域聚合（每天一列，無按安裝維度）無限期保留，以便 /stats 上的歷史圖表保持穩定。

trans-unit.source: Open the FSB Control Panel, scroll to Advanced Settings, and toggle Send anonymous usage data off. The change takes effect immediately; no further events will be sent from your install.
trans-unit.target: 開啟 FSB 控制面板，捲動至「進階設定」，將 傳送匿名使用資料 開關關閉。變更立即生效；之後不會再從你的安裝傳送事件。

trans-unit.source: To request erasure of all telemetry rows associated with your install (GDPR Article 17), look up your fsbInstallUuid in Chrome DevTools → Application → Storage → Extension storage, then send a single HTTP request:
trans-unit.target: To request erasure of all telemetry rows associated with your install (GDPR Article 17), look up your fsbInstallUuid in Chrome DevTools → Application → Storage → Extension storage, then send a single HTTP request:

trans-unit.id: PRIVACY_TELEMETRY_ERASE_CURL|GDPR Article 17 erasure curl command. Copy this command literally; do not translate.

trans-unit.source: FSB's anonymous usage telemetry is used only to compute aggregate usage statistics displayed publicly at full-selfbrowsing.com/stats. The data is never sold, never shared with third parties, never used for advertising, and never used to train any machine-learning models. This commitment satisfies the Chrome Web Store's Limited Use requirement.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的匿名使用遙測僅用於計算在 full-selfbrowsing.com/stats 公開展示的聚合使用統計。資料從不出售、從不與第三方共享、從不用於廣告，且從不用於訓練任何機器學習模型。此承諾滿足 Chrome Web Store 的 Limited Use 要求。

trans-unit.source: We publish aggregated metrics derived from this telemetry pipeline at /stats. Only counts and totals are shown; no per-install row is ever exposed.
trans-unit.target: 我們在 /stats 發布來自此遙測管線的聚合指標。僅展示計數和總數；每安裝的列從不公開。

trans-unit.source: FSB's automation posture is opt-out: non-denylisted origins inherit a user-configurable global default that currently ships as Auto, while explicit per-origin policies can set an origin to Off, Ask, or Auto. Audit-log retention is local and bounded, with export and clear controls available from the Control Panel.
trans-unit.target: FSB's automation posture is opt-out: non-denylisted origins inherit a user-configurable global default that currently ships as Auto, while explicit per-origin policies can set an origin to Off, Ask, or Auto. Audit-log retention is local and bounded, with export and clear controls available from the Control Panel.

trans-unit.source: The service denylist is still a hard block. Denied origins are non-enableable regardless of the global default or any stored per-origin policy.
trans-unit.target: The service denylist is still a hard block. Denied origins are non-enableable regardless of the global default or any stored per-origin policy.

trans-unit.source: Sensitive origins can run reads under Auto, but writes re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in before execution. Non-sensitive origins can be opted out or moved to Ask from the Control Panel's Consent & Audit section.
trans-unit.target: Sensitive origins can run reads under Auto, but writes re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in before execution. Non-sensitive origins can be opted out or moved to Ask from the Control Panel's Consent & Audit section.

trans-unit.source: Every capability call is recorded in a redacted, append-only local audit log. No arguments, tokens, cookies, or response bodies are ever stored.
trans-unit.target: 每次能力呼叫都會記錄於經過遮蔽、僅可附加的本機稽核日誌中。絕不會儲存任何引數、權杖、Cookie 或回應內容。

trans-unit.source: FSB is fully open source under the BSL 1.1 License. You can audit every line of code to verify these privacy claims. The source code is available on GitHub.
trans-unit.target: FSB is fully open source under the BSL 1.1 License. You can audit every line of code to verify these privacy claims. The source code is available on GitHub.

trans-unit.source: If this policy is updated, the changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Significant changes will also be noted in the project's GitHub release notes.
trans-unit.target: 若本政策更新，變更將體現在頁面頂部的“最後更新”日期。重要變更也會在專案的 GitHub 釋出說明中註明。

trans-unit.source: If you have questions about this privacy policy or FSB's data handling, please open an issue on GitHub Issues.
trans-unit.target: If you have questions about this privacy policy or FSB's data handling, please open an issue on GitHub Issues.

trans-unit.source: Each entry below is a complete snapshot of the privacy policy as it stood on the date shown. Older versions are kept so you can audit what we promised at any point in time.
trans-unit.target: Each entry below is a complete snapshot of the privacy policy as it stood on the date shown. Older versions are kept so you can audit what we promised at any point in time.

trans-unit.source: How FSB handles your data: API keys encrypted in Chrome local storage, opt-out anonymous usage telemetry, automation runs locally in your browser. BYO key, BYO browser.
trans-unit.target: FSB 如何處理你的資料：API Key 在 Chrome 本地儲存中加密，可選退出的匿名使用遙測，自動化在你的瀏覽器內本地執行。BYO key, BYO browser.

trans-unit.source: While building FSB, I hit wall after wall. Chrome's policies, no access to non web pages, no real JavaScript execution. At some point I said fuck it: I'm going to solve everything myself and build a fucking browser. That's Prometheus, an active build, with the native control spine, the stdio MCP bridge, multi agent tab ownership, the runtime sidebar, and DOM native supervision already in place.
trans-unit.target: While building FSB, I hit wall after wall. Chrome's policies, no access to non web pages, no real JavaScript execution. At some point I said fuck it: I'm going to solve everything myself and build a fucking browser. That's Prometheus, an active build, with the native control spine, the stdio MCP bridge, multi agent tab ownership, the runtime sidebar, and DOM native supervision already in place.

trans-unit.source: * Approximate. The launch window is closing in fast.
trans-unit.target: * Approximate. The launch window is closing in fast.

trans-unit.source: Prometheus is the autonomous browser build behind FSB: native control spine, stdio MCP bridge, multi-agent tab ownership, runtime sidebar, and DOM-native supervision.
trans-unit.target: Prometheus is the autonomous browser build behind FSB: native control spine, stdio MCP bridge, multi-agent tab ownership, runtime sidebar, and DOM-native supervision.

trans-unit.source: The vision is simple. Anyone in the community can upload their well tested site maps. These are schemas that get included in FSB when they prove promising. Community contribution is still under development, so please check back again later.
trans-unit.target: 願景很簡單。社群中的任何人都可以上傳經過充分測試的網站地圖。這些是經確認有潛力後會被納入 FSB 的架構。社群貢獻功能仍在開發中，請稍後再回來查看。

trans-unit.source: Community site maps for FSB are under development. Contribute well tested site schemas that can become built-in browser knowledge.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的社群網站地圖仍在開發中。你可以貢獻經過充分測試的網站架構，它們有機會成為內建瀏覽器知識。
每位活躍用戶的平均代理數

trans-unit.source: Retrying at . The unauthenticated API allows 60 requests / hour / IP - we'll be back shortly.
trans-unit.target: Retrying at . The unauthenticated API allows 60 requests / hour / IP - we'll be back shortly.

trans-unit.source: The page retries automatically every 5 minutes.
trans-unit.target: The page retries automatically every 5 minutes.
活躍用戶（5 分鐘視窗）
活躍代理（10 分鐘視窗）

trans-unit.source: Each lit node is live activity, clustered by region.
trans-unit.target: 每個亮起的節點代表即時活動，依地區聚類顯示。

trans-unit.source: Not enough anonymous activity yet to break down by region — check back soon.
trans-unit.target: 匿名活動資料尚不足以依地區細分——請稍後再回來查看。

trans-unit.source: Find answers to common questions, troubleshoot issues, or reach out for help.
trans-unit.target: 查詢常見問題答案、排查故障，或尋求幫助。

trans-unit.source: Install from the Chrome Web Store. One click and the FSB icon appears in your toolbar. Prefer to run from source? Download the latest release from GitHub, then load it unpacked: open chrome://extensions, enable Developer Mode, click "Load unpacked," and select the FSB folder.
trans-unit.target: Install from the Chrome Web Store. One click and the FSB icon appears in your toolbar. Prefer to run from source? Download the latest release from GitHub, then load it unpacked: open chrome://extensions, enable Developer Mode, click "Load unpacked," and select the FSB folder.

trans-unit.source: Which AI provider should I use?
trans-unit.target: 應該使用哪個 AI 提供商？

trans-unit.source: We recommend xAI Grok 4.1 Fast for the best balance of speed and accuracy. It has a 2M token context window and costs $0.20/$0.50 per million tokens. For a free hosted option, try Gemini 2.0 Flash (experimental). For maximum quality, use Claude Opus 4.6 or Grok 4.1. If you want broad model access, use OpenRouter. If you want a privacy-friendly local setup with no API key, use LM Studio.
trans-unit.target: We recommend xAI Grok 4.1 Fast for the best balance of speed and accuracy. It has a 2M token context window and costs $0.20/$0.50 per million tokens. For a free hosted option, try Gemini 2.0 Flash (experimental). For maximum quality, use Claude Opus 4.6 or Grok 4.1. If you want broad model access, use OpenRouter. If you want a privacy-friendly local setup with no API key, use LM Studio.

trans-unit.source: FSB supports Chrome 88+ and all Chromium-based browsers including Microsoft Edge, Brave, Opera, and Vivaldi. Firefox support is planned for a future release.
trans-unit.target: FSB 支援 Chrome 88 及以上版本，以及所有基於 Chromium 的瀏覽器，包括 Microsoft Edge、Brave、Opera 和 Vivaldi。Firefox 支援已計劃在未來版本提供。
我的 API Key 安全嗎？

trans-unit.source: Yes. API keys are encrypted using AES-GCM before being stored in Chrome's local storage. They are only decrypted in-memory when making API calls. Keys are never logged, exported, or transmitted to any server other than your chosen AI provider.
trans-unit.target: 安全。API Key 在儲存到 Chrome 本地儲存前，會透過 AES-GCM 加密。僅在 API 呼叫時在記憶體中解密。Key 不會被記錄、匯出，也不會被傳輸到你所選 AI 提供商之外的任何伺服器。

trans-unit.source: FSB includes action validation and safety checks. It only performs actions on the current tab and only when explicitly instructed. All code is open source and auditable. That said, use caution with tasks involving sensitive accounts or financial transactions -- always review what FSB is doing.
trans-unit.target: FSB 內建動作校驗和安全檢查。它只在你明確指示時，對當前標籤頁執行動作。所有程式碼開源可審計。即便如此，對涉及敏感賬號或金融交易的任務仍需謹慎，請始終核對 FSB 的操作。

trans-unit.source: How do I report a bug?

Open an issue on the GitHub Issues page. Include the website URL, your task description, and any error messages from the FSB chat or browser console. Session logs from the Debug tab in Options can also help.
trans-unit.target: Open an issue on the GitHub Issues page. Include the website URL, your task description, and any error messages from the FSB chat or browser console. Session logs from the Debug tab in Options can also help.

trans-unit.source: What is MCP and how do I use it?

MCP (Model Context Protocol) lets you control FSB from AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and OpenClaw. The MCP server runs as npx -y fsb-mcp-server and pairs with the running extension over a local WebSocket bridge. FSB exposes 66 MCP tools (click, type, navigate, read DOM, fill vault credentials, and more). For OpenClaw users specifically, the fastest path is the one-click install on ClawHub at clawhub.ai/lakshmanturlapati/full-selfbrowsing, or load the FSB skill at skills/fsb/ which prints the stdio config block and runs the doctor diagnostic. The full rundown lives at the Agents page.
trans-unit.target: MCP (Model Context Protocol) lets you control FSB from AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and OpenClaw. The MCP server runs as npx -y fsb-mcp-server and pairs with the running extension over a local WebSocket bridge. FSB exposes 66 MCP tools (click, type, navigate, read DOM, fill vault credentials, and more). For OpenClaw users specifically, the fastest path is the one-click install on ClawHub at clawhub.ai/lakshmanturlapati/full-selfbrowsing, or load the FSB skill at skills/fsb/ which prints the stdio config block and runs the doctor diagnostic. The full rundown lives at the Agents page.

trans-unit.source: How does FSB help Claude Code or Codex test apps?
trans-unit.target: FSB 如何幫助 Claude Code 或 Codex 測試應用？

trans-unit.source: Connect FSB as an MCP server, then let the coding agent open the local app, click through real flows, observe DOM state, capture console or task errors, and report failures back into the coding session. This closes the manual loop between code generation, browser testing, logging, and fixing.
trans-unit.target: 把 FSB 作為 MCP 伺服器接入後，讓編碼智慧體開啟本地應用、走真實流程、觀察 DOM 狀態、捕獲控制檯或任務報錯，並把失敗回報到編碼會話。這樣就把程式碼生成、瀏覽器測試、日誌和修復的手動閉環打通了。
可以遠端控制 FSB 嗎？

trans-unit.source: Yes. The Remote Dashboard at full-selfbrowsing.com lets you pair with your FSB extension via QR code, then send tasks, view a live DOM preview of the browser, and monitor current execution state from any device with a web browser.
trans-unit.target: 可以。full-selfbrowsing.com 的遠端控制檯可透過二維碼與你的 FSB 擴充套件配對，之後你可以從任何帶瀏覽器的裝置下發任務、檢視瀏覽器 DOM 實時預覽並監控當前執行狀態。

trans-unit.source: Does FSB learn from my usage?
trans-unit.target: FSB 會從我的使用中學習嗎？

trans-unit.source: FSB has a local memory system with three layers: semantic memory (site navigation patterns), episodic memory (past action sequences), and procedural memory (successful workflows). This data stays on your device and helps FSB navigate familiar sites faster and avoid repeating mistakes. Memory auto-consolidates after enough sessions.
trans-unit.target: FSB 具備三層本地記憶系統：語義記憶（站點導航模式）、情景記憶（過去的動作序列）和過程性記憶（成功的工作流）。這些資料保留在你的裝置上，幫助 FSB 更快地操作熟悉的站點，避免重複犯錯。經過足夠會話後，記憶會自動整合。

trans-unit.source: How do I set up FSB's MCP server with my IDE?
trans-unit.target: 如何在 IDE 中配置 FSB 的 MCP 伺服器？

trans-unit.source: Run npx -y fsb-mcp-server install --list to see which MCP hosts the installer detects on your machine, then run the installer for one (for example npx -y fsb-mcp-server install --claude-desktop). Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and others have matching flags from --list. For OpenClaw, paste the canonical stdio block printed by the FSB skill (loaded from skills/fsb/) into your OpenClaw MCP config -- the bare --openclaw installer flag is intentionally manual because OpenClaw's MCP config schema is still unstable across builds. Verify the install with npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor; six green layers means you're ready.
trans-unit.target: 執行 npx -y fsb-mcp-server install --list 檢視安裝器在你機器上檢測到的 MCP 宿主，然後為其中之一執行安裝器（例如 npx -y fsb-mcp-server install --claude-desktop）。Cursor、Codex、Windsurf 等都有對應 --list 列出的標誌。對於 OpenClaw，請把 FSB 技能（從 skills/fsb/ 載入）輸出的標準 stdio 塊貼上到 OpenClaw MCP 配置中——單獨的 --openclaw 安裝標誌故意保持手動，因為 OpenClaw 的 MCP 配置 schema 在版本之間還不穩定。安裝後用 npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor 驗證；6 層全部為綠表示就緒。

trans-unit.source: What can I do with FSB through MCP tools?
trans-unit.target: 透過 MCP 工具可以用 FSB 做什麼？

trans-unit.source: FSB exposes two modes through MCP. Manual mode is the default and gives the calling agent 66 granular tools: navigate, click, type, scroll, read page state, take screenshots, upload real local files with upload_file, arm trigger watchers with trigger / get_trigger_status / list_triggers, and search or invoke guarded first-party API capabilities with search_capabilities and invoke_capability. Vault and payment helpers fill inside the encrypted extension store, so raw secrets do not cross the MCP bridge. Autopilot mode (run_task) only fires when the user explicitly delegates the whole task. For everything else the calling agent stays in the loop on every action.
trans-unit.target: FSB 透過 MCP 提供兩種模式。Manual 模式 為預設，並為呼叫端代理提供 66 個細粒度工具：導覽、點擊、輸入、捲動、讀取頁面狀態、截圖、用 upload_file 上傳真實本機檔案、用 trigger / get_trigger_status / list_triggers 部署觸發監視器，以及搜尋或呼叫受保護的第一方 API 能力（search_capabilities 與 invoke_capability）。保險庫與付款助手在加密的擴充功能儲存內填寫，因此原始密鑰不會越過 MCP 橋接。Autopilot 模式 (run_task)僅在使用者明確委派整項任務時才會啟動。其餘情況下，呼叫端代理在每個操作上都保持在迴圈中。

trans-unit.source: How do I install FSB on OpenClaw?
trans-unit.target: 如何在 OpenClaw 上安裝 FSB？

trans-unit.source: Three options, fastest first. One-click on ClawHub: install from clawhub.ai/lakshmanturlapati/full-selfbrowsing. FSB skill: load the skill from skills/fsb/ in the FSB repo. It prints the canonical OpenClaw stdio block for you to paste into OpenClaw's MCP config and offers consent-gated install for any other MCP hosts on your machine. The full 3-step walkthrough (Chrome extension, MCP server config, doctor verification) lives at the Agents page.
trans-unit.target: Three options, fastest first. One-click on ClawHub: install from clawhub.ai/lakshmanturlapati/full-selfbrowsing. FSB skill: load the skill from skills/fsb/ in the FSB repo. It prints the canonical OpenClaw stdio block for you to paste into OpenClaw's MCP config and offers consent-gated install for any other MCP hosts on your machine. The full 3-step walkthrough (Chrome extension, MCP server config, doctor verification) lives at the Agents page.

trans-unit.source: How do I verify the FSB MCP server is healthy?
trans-unit.target: 如何驗證 FSB MCP 伺服器是否健康？

trans-unit.source: Run npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor. The doctor walks six layers -- package, bridge, extension, active-tab, content-script, config -- and exits non-zero on the first failure with a one-line next-step recommendation. The full recovery table for each layer lives in skills/fsb/USAGE.md, and the same diagnostic runs automatically when the FSB skill is loaded into OpenClaw.
trans-unit.target: 執行 npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor。doctor 會檢查 6 層 —— package、bridge、extension、active-tab、content-script、config —— 並在首次失敗時非零退出，輸出一行下一步建議。每層完整的恢復表格位於 skills/fsb/USAGE.md，當 FSB 技能載入到 OpenClaw 時也會自動執行同樣的診斷。

trans-unit.source: The extension cannot reach the AI provider's API endpoint.
trans-unit.target: 擴充套件無法訪問 AI 提供商的 API 端點。

trans-unit.source: Verify your API key in Options. Check that the correct provider and model are selected. Ensure you have internet connectivity and the provider's service is not experiencing downtime.
trans-unit.target: 在“選項”中確認你的 API Key。檢查所選提供商和模型是否正確。確保網路連線正常且提供商服務未發生故障。

trans-unit.source: The FSB icon is grayed out or clicking it does nothing.
trans-unit.target: FSB 圖示變灰或點選沒有反應。

trans-unit.source: Go to chrome://extensions, find FSB, and click the refresh button. If that does not work, remove and re-load the extension. Make sure you are not on a chrome:// or edge:// page.
trans-unit.target: 開啟 chrome://extensions，找到 FSB 並點選重新整理按鈕。若仍無效，請移除並重新載入擴充套件。注意不要在 chrome:// 或 edge:// 頁面上。

trans-unit.source: FSB clicks or types but nothing happens on the page.
trans-unit.target: FSB 在點選或輸入，但頁面沒有反應。

trans-unit.source: Some websites use dynamic rendering that changes element selectors. Try refreshing the page and re-running the task. Enable Debug Mode in Options to see detailed action logs. Some sites with heavy anti-bot measures may block automated interactions.
trans-unit.target: 某些網站使用動態渲染，會改變元素選擇器。嘗試重新整理頁面後重跑任務。在“選項”中開啟“除錯模式”可檢視詳細動作日誌。帶有強反爬措施的站點可能會阻止自動化互動。

trans-unit.source: If you cannot find an answer here, reach out through GitHub.
trans-unit.target: 如果在此處找不到答案，請透過 GitHub 聯絡。

trans-unit.source: Install from the Chrome Web Store. One click and the FSB icon appears in your toolbar. Prefer to run from source? Download the latest release from GitHub, then load it unpacked: open chrome://extensions, enable Developer Mode, click "Load unpacked," and select the FSB folder.
trans-unit.target: Install from the Chrome Web Store. One click and the FSB icon appears in your toolbar. Prefer to run from source? Download the latest release from GitHub, then load it unpacked: open chrome://extensions, enable Developer Mode, click "Load unpacked," and select the FSB folder.

trans-unit.source: Which AI provider should I use?
trans-unit.target: Which AI provider should I use?

trans-unit.source: We recommend xAI Grok 4.1 Fast for the best balance of speed and accuracy. It has a 2M token context window and costs $0.20/$0.50 per million tokens. For a free hosted option, try Gemini 2.0 Flash (experimental). For maximum quality, use Claude Opus 4.6 or Grok 4.1. If you want broad model access, use OpenRouter. If you want a privacy-friendly local setup with no API key, use LM Studio.
trans-unit.target: We recommend xAI Grok 4.1 Fast for the best balance of speed and accuracy. It has a 2M token context window and costs $0.20/$0.50 per million tokens. For a free hosted option, try Gemini 2.0 Flash (experimental). For maximum quality, use Claude Opus 4.6 or Grok 4.1. If you want broad model access, use OpenRouter. If you want a privacy-friendly local setup with no API key, use LM Studio.

trans-unit.source: FSB supports Chrome 88+ and all Chromium-based browsers including Microsoft Edge, Brave, Opera, and Vivaldi. Firefox support is planned for a future release.
trans-unit.target: FSB supports Chrome 88+ and all Chromium-based browsers including Microsoft Edge, Brave, Opera, and Vivaldi. Firefox support is planned for a future release.

trans-unit.source: Yes. API keys are encrypted using AES-GCM before being stored in Chrome's local storage. They are only decrypted in-memory when making API calls. Keys are never logged, exported, or transmitted to any server other than your chosen AI provider.
trans-unit.target: Yes. API keys are encrypted using AES-GCM before being stored in Chrome's local storage. They are only decrypted in-memory when making API calls. Keys are never logged, exported, or transmitted to any server other than your chosen AI provider.

trans-unit.source: FSB includes action validation and safety checks. It only performs actions on the current tab and only when explicitly instructed. All code is open source and auditable. That said, use caution with tasks involving sensitive accounts or financial transactions -- always review what FSB is doing.
trans-unit.target: FSB includes action validation and safety checks. It only performs actions on the current tab and only when explicitly instructed. All code is open source and auditable. That said, use caution with tasks involving sensitive accounts or financial transactions -- always review what FSB is doing.

trans-unit.source: Get help with FSB: setup guides, MCP configuration, troubleshooting, GitHub issues, and direct contact for the open-source Chrome extension.
trans-unit.target: 獲取 FSB 幫助：安裝指南、MCP 配置、故障排查、GitHub issues 以及與開源 Chrome 擴充套件的直接聯絡。
最後更新：2026 年 7 月

trans-unit.source: This document records FSB's legal/Terms-of-Service posture, its consent model, the audit-log retention policy, and the service-denylist rationale. It is the human-readable companion to the runtime controls shipped in Phase 30 (consent governance, recipe signature verification, the no-secrets audit log, and the service denylist).
trans-unit.target: 本文件記載 FSB 的法律／服務條款立場、其同意機制模型、稽核記錄保留政策，以及服務拒絕清單的理由依據。本文件是 Phase 30 所隨附之執行期控制項（同意治理、配方簽章驗證、無機密稽核記錄，以及服務拒絕清單）的可讀對照說明。

trans-unit.source: Scope note: this is an engineering governance document, not legal advice. It describes how FSB is built to behave and the boundaries it enforces.
trans-unit.target: 範疇說明：本文件屬工程治理文件，並非法律意見。它描述 FSB 的設計行為方式，以及其強制執行的界線。

trans-unit.source: FSB (Full Self-Browsing) is a supervised, local-first browser-automation capability layer. The posture is deliberately conservative:
trans-unit.target: FSB（Full Self-Browsing）是一套受監督、以本機為先的瀏覽器自動化能力層。此立場刻意採取保守設計：

trans-unit.source: Opt-out per origin. The shipped default is Auto for non-denied origins, with per-origin Off / Ask / Auto controls. The user can opt any origin out, and can set the global default to Off to restore strict opt-in behavior.
trans-unit.target: 依來源選擇退出（opt-out）。出廠預設值為「非拒絕來源皆為 Auto」，並提供依來源設定的 Off／Ask／Auto 控制項。使用者可將任一來源設為選擇退出，亦可將全域預設值設為 Off，以恢復嚴格的選擇加入（opt-in）行為。

trans-unit.source: Local execution. Automation runs in the user's own authenticated browser session. FSB does not proxy a user's credentials to any server and does not replay captured credentials off-device.
trans-unit.target: 本機執行。自動化作業於使用者自身已驗證的瀏覽器工作階段中執行。FSB 不會將使用者憑證代理傳送至任何伺服器，亦不會將擷取到的憑證在裝置外重放使用。

trans-unit.source: Respect site Terms of Service.FSB is a general-purpose automation tool; the operator is responsible for using it within the Terms of Service of the sites they automate. FSB ships a service policy file (below) that currently hard-denies Netflix and OnlyFans, and classifies additional sensitive categories for mutating-write gating and audit visibility.
trans-unit.target: 遵守網站服務條款。FSB 是一項通用型自動化工具；操作者須負責在其自動化操作的網站服務條款範圍內使用本工具。FSB 隨附一份服務政策檔案（詳見下文），目前已硬性拒絕 Netflix 與 OnlyFans，並將其他敏感類別分類納入變更寫入型管控與稽核可見性範圍。

trans-unit.source: No code fetched as data. Recipes are closed-vocabulary JSON data, not code. The recipe interpreter is dynamic-code-free, and server-delivered or learned recipes (a future capability) must pass cryptographic signature verification before they can bind to a credentialed call.
trans-unit.target: 不以程式碼作為資料擷取。配方（Recipe）為封閉詞彙集的 JSON 資料，並非程式碼。配方直譯器不含任何動態程式碼執行機制；由伺服器提供或經學習取得的配方（未來能力）必須先通過加密簽章驗證，才能繫結至具憑證的呼叫。

trans-unit.source: Consent is enforced at a single dispatch chokepoint (one gate, both front doors), immediately after the existing ownership gate. The shipped posture is opt-out ("fully open"): a global default mode applies to every origin the user has not explicitly configured, and the user opts individual origins out. The global default ships as Auto and is user-configurable (Off / Ask / Auto) under Advanced Settings → Consent & Audit → "Default for New Sites".
trans-unit.target: 同意機制於單一分派瓶頸點（一道閘門，涵蓋兩個前門入口）強制執行，緊接於既有的擁有權閘門之後。出廠立場為選擇退出（「完全開放」）：全域預設模式適用於使用者尚未明確設定的每個來源，而使用者則針對個別來源選擇退出。全域預設值出廠設定為 Auto，且使用者可於「進階設定 → 同意與稽核 →「新網站的預設值」」中自行設定（Off／Ask／Auto）。

trans-unit.source: Capability invocations run without per-call prompting, including reads and writes, against any non-denylisted origin, except that a write to a sensitive origin re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04; see the Categorization Axes below). Reads, and writes to non-sensitive origins, run freely under Auto.
trans-unit.target: 能力呼叫在不逐次提示的情況下執行，涵蓋讀取及寫入操作，適用於任何未列入拒絕清單的來源；唯一例外是對敏感來源的寫入會在呼叫閘門重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制（立場 B／DENY-04；詳見下方的分類軸線）。讀取操作，以及對非敏感來源的寫入操作，在 Auto 模式下皆可自由執行。

trans-unit.source: Each invocation surfaces a pending request out-of-band (control panel + a badge) for the user to grant; nothing runs until granted. There is no blocking in-page modal mid-invocation.
trans-unit.target: 每次呼叫皆會於頁面外（控制面板 + 徽章提示）顯示一筆待處理請求，供使用者核准；未經核准前不會執行任何操作。過程中不會出現封鎖頁面的彈出視窗。

trans-unit.source: Nothing runs against the origin. Capability invocations return a typed consent-required reason. Set an individual origin to Off to opt it out, or set the global default to Off to restore strict opt-in.
trans-unit.target: 不會對該來源執行任何操作。能力呼叫會回傳一組具型別的「需要同意」原因。將個別來源設為 Off 即可使其選擇退出，或將全域預設值設為 Off 以恢復嚴格的選擇加入機制。

trans-unit.source: Denylist is the one hard block. A denylisted origin is non-enableable regardless of the global default or any per-origin policy. The current hard denylist is intentionally narrow: Netflix and OnlyFans. The denylist is consulted first, before the consent mode.
trans-unit.target: 拒絕清單是唯一的硬性封鎖機制。不論全域預設值或任何依來源政策為何，列於拒絕清單中的來源皆無法啟用。目前的硬性拒絕清單刻意維持極小範圍：Netflix 與 OnlyFans。拒絕清單會優先被查核，早於同意模式之前。

trans-unit.source: Per-origin opt-out. Every origin FSB acts on is listed in the control panel (sourced from the audit trail) so the user can set it to Off (or Ask) at any time. An explicit per-origin policy overrides the global default.
trans-unit.target: 依來源選擇退出。FSB 所操作的每一個來源皆會列示於控制面板中（資料來源為稽核軌跡），使用者可隨時將其設為 Off（或 Ask）。明確的依來源政策設定會覆蓋全域預設值。

trans-unit.source: Writes to non-sensitive origins are allowed under Auto. Under the opt-out posture, for a non-sensitive origin read-Auto implies write-Auto: side-effecting invocations (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) run without a separate elevated opt-in, and the per-origin mutating flag is inert at the invoke gate. A write to a sensitive origin is the exception: it re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04), so the mutating flag IS consulted there for sensitive origins (see the Categorization Axes section). Reads run under Auto everywhere.
trans-unit.target: 在 Auto 模式下，允許對非敏感來源進行寫入。在選擇退出立場下，對於非敏感來源而言，讀取為 Auto 即隱含寫入亦為 Auto：具副作用的呼叫（POST／PUT／PATCH／DELETE）無需另行提升層級的選擇加入即可執行，且依來源設定的變更寫入旗標於呼叫閘門處為無效狀態。對敏感來源的寫入為例外情形：其會在呼叫閘門重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制（立場 B／DENY-04），因此針對敏感來源，該變更寫入旗標「確實」會於此處被查核（詳見分類軸線章節）。讀取操作在任何情況下皆於 Auto 模式下執行。

trans-unit.source: Sensitive-origin writes are re-gated at the invoke gate; reads are not. Origins classified as sensitive (banking, primary email, government, and the payments / budgeting / social / messaging categories below) run reads under Auto, but a write re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the capability invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04) before it is permitted. In addition, the more invasive network-capture discovery path keeps its own, broader explicit confirmation for sensitive origins. (Sensitive writes are NOT ungated under Auto: the invoke gate re-applies the mutating opt-in for them.)
trans-unit.target: 敏感來源的寫入操作會在呼叫閘門重新受管控；讀取操作則不會。被分類為敏感的來源（銀行、主要電子郵件、政府機關，以及下方之支付／預算／社群／通訊類別）在 Auto 模式下可執行讀取操作，但寫入操作會在能力呼叫閘門處重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制（立場 B／DENY-04），方能獲准執行。此外，較具侵入性的網路擷取探索路徑，針對敏感來源仍保留其自身、範圍更廣的明確確認機制。（敏感來源之寫入操作在 Auto 模式下並「非」不受管控：呼叫閘門會針對其重新套用變更寫入選擇加入機制。）

trans-unit.source: Reverting to opt-in. Setting the global default to Off restores the strict opt-in posture: nothing runs against an origin until the user enables it.
trans-unit.target: 恢復為選擇加入。將全域預設值設為 Off 可恢復嚴格的選擇加入立場：在使用者啟用該來源之前，不會對其執行任何操作。

trans-unit.source: Security note: under the shipped Auto default, FSB can call a non-denylisted site's authenticated web API using the browser's logged-in session, without a per-site prompt: reads everywhere, and writes to non-sensitive origins. A write to a sensitive origin is re-gated at the invoke gate (it re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in; posture B / DENY-04). This is a deliberate, user-configurable posture; the denylist, the per-origin and global opt-out, the sensitive-write re-gate, the active-tab origin pin, the fail-closed degradation path, and the append-only audit trail remain in force.
trans-unit.target: 安全性提示：在出廠的 Auto 預設設定下，FSB 可利用瀏覽器已登入的工作階段，呼叫未列入拒絕清單網站的已驗證 Web API，且無需逐站提示：任何地方皆可讀取，並可對非敏感來源進行寫入。對敏感來源的寫入操作會在呼叫閘門重新受管控（重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制；立場 B／DENY-04）。此為刻意設計、且使用者可自行設定的立場；拒絕清單、依來源與全域的選擇退出機制、敏感寫入的重新管控機制、使用中分頁的來源鎖定、故障時預設關閉的降級路徑，以及僅可附加寫入的稽核軌跡，皆持續有效。

trans-unit.source: Every capability invocation is recorded in an append-only, secret-free audit log so the operator can review what ran.
trans-unit.target: 每一次能力呼叫皆會記錄於一份僅可附加、不含機密資料的稽核記錄中，使操作者得以檢視已執行的操作內容。

trans-unit.source: The audit entry schema is, by construction, free of secrets and request payloads:
trans-unit.target: 稽核項目結構在設計上即不含機密資料與請求酬載：

trans-unit.source: The audit log never stores invocation arguments, request or response bodies, cookies, tokens, CSRF values, bearer credentials, or any other authentication material. Auth material never leaves the device and is never persisted. Every recorded field additionally passes through a shape-only redactor before persistence (URLs are reduced to their origin; strings to a shape descriptor; errors to name and message only). A test asserts that no authentication substring survives in the persisted log.
trans-unit.target: 稽核記錄絕不儲存呼叫參數、請求或回應內容、Cookie、權杖（token）、CSRF 值、持有者憑證（bearer credentials），或任何其他驗證相關資料。驗證相關資料絕不會離開裝置，也絕不會被持久化保存。每個記錄欄位在儲存前皆會額外通過僅保留形狀資訊的遮蔽處理（URL 會化簡為其來源；字串會化簡為形狀描述子；錯誤僅保留名稱與訊息）。有一項測試會斷言，已持久化的記錄中不會殘留任何驗證相關子字串。

trans-unit.source: The audit log is a bounded ring buffer: the most recent entries are retained and older entries are trimmed automatically (FIFO). The user has an export and clear control to export the current log and clear it on demand. The log is secret-free by construction; encryption at rest is therefore unnecessary and is out of scope. Long-term archival and deeper retention tooling are intentionally deferred; the bounded ring plus export/clear is the Phase-30 retention policy.
trans-unit.target: 稽核記錄採用有限容量環狀緩衝區：僅保留最近的項目，較舊的項目會自動修剪（先進先出）。使用者可使用匯出與清除控制項，隨時匯出目前的記錄並將其清除。由於記錄在設計上即不含機密資料，靜態加密因此並非必要，亦不在本文件範圍內。長期封存與更深入的保留工具刻意予以延後處理；有限容量環狀緩衝區搭配匯出／清除功能，即為 Phase 30 的保留政策。

trans-unit.source: FSB ships a conservative service denylist at extension/config/service-denylist.json, loaded at service-worker startup and consulted before per-origin consent. It is the single source of truth for whether an origin is denied or sensitive.
trans-unit.target: FSB 隨附一份保守的服務拒絕清單，位於 extension/config/service-denylist.json，於服務工作執行緒（service-worker）啟動時載入，並於依來源同意查核之前被查詢。此檔案是判斷某一來源是否遭拒絕或屬敏感的唯一真實來源。

trans-unit.source: deniedOrigins: the hard block list. Current runtime policy intentionally narrows this to Netflix and OnlyFans. A denylisted origin is rendered non-enableable: the consent gate blocks it even if a stored policy says Auto, and the control panel greys it out with the documented reason.
trans-unit.target: deniedOrigins：硬性封鎖清單。目前的執行期政策刻意將此清單縮限為 Netflix 與 OnlyFans。列於拒絕清單中的來源會被呈現為無法啟用狀態：即使已儲存的政策設定為 Auto，同意閘門仍會將其封鎖，且控制面板會將其顯示為灰階並附上明確理由說明。

trans-unit.source: sensitiveOrigins: allowed-but-governed origins. This includes banking, government, primary email, brokerage / trading, payments, money movement, social, messaging, media, AI-chat, commerce, travel, and other categories that require mutating-write gating and audit visibility but are not hard-denied.
trans-unit.target: sensitiveOrigins：允許使用但受治理管控的來源。此類別涵蓋銀行、政府機關、主要電子郵件、證券／交易經紀、支付、資金移轉、社群、通訊、媒體、AI 聊天、電子商務、旅遊，以及其他需要變更寫入型管控與稽核可見性、但未遭硬性拒絕的類別。

trans-unit.source: The service policy is conservative without being an aggressive broad blocklist, and it is user-extensible. Host patterns use a https://*.<domain> subdomain-wildcard form (matching the apex and any subdomain) or an exact origin. A comprehensive, per-service legal review is ongoing; the policy file establishes the mechanism and the current default posture.
trans-unit.target: 此服務政策採取保守設計，但並非採取激進的大範圍封鎖策略，且具備使用者可擴充性。主機比對樣式採用 https://*.<domain> 子網域萬用字元形式（比對頂層網域及其任何子網域），或採用精確來源比對。目前正持續進行全面性、逐服務的法律審查；本政策檔案所建立的是機制本身與目前的預設立場。

trans-unit.source: An origin's classification is decided along three distinct criteria. These axes are independent: an origin can be hard-denied, allowed-but-sensitive, or safe. service-denylist.js classify(origin) is the single source of truth that resolves an origin to denied / sensitive / safe.
trans-unit.target: 一個來源的分類，係依三項各自獨立的準則決定。這些軸線彼此獨立：一個來源可能屬於硬性拒絕、允許使用但屬敏感，或屬安全。service-denylist.js classify(origin) 是判斷來源為拒絕／敏感／安全的唯一真實來源。

trans-unit.source: Hard denial. Hard-denied origins are non-enableable regardless of consent mode. The current runtime hard-denied roster is intentionally narrow: netflix and onlyfans.
trans-unit.target: 硬性拒絕。不論同意模式為何，遭硬性拒絕的來源皆無法啟用。目前執行期的硬性拒絕名單刻意維持極小範圍：netflix 與 onlyfans。

trans-unit.source: Sensitive governance (Ask / mutating-gated). Allowed-but-sensitive origins are not hard-denied. Reads run under Auto everywhere; a write to a sensitive origin re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in (posture B / DENY-04) before it is permitted. This is where banking and government hosts, primary email, brokerage / trading (robinhood, fidelity, carta), payments and money movement, budgeting, social, messaging, media, and AI-chat origins sit. For example, instagram, facebook, tiktok, and x are sensitive, not denied; their reads remain available under Auto and their writes are gated. Payments (e.g. dashboard.stripe.com, coinbase, twilio), Carta read-only portfolio/account data, budgeting (ynab), and messaging-app writes are classified on this axis as well.
trans-unit.target: 敏感治理（Ask／變更寫入受管控）。允許使用但屬敏感的來源並未遭硬性拒絕。讀取操作在任何地方皆於 Auto 模式下執行；對敏感來源的寫入操作會重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制（立場 B／DENY-04），方能獲准執行。銀行與政府機關主機、主要電子郵件、證券／交易經紀（robinhood、fidelity、carta），支付與資金移轉、預算規劃、社群、通訊、媒體，以及 AI 聊天等來源，即屬於此分類。舉例而言，instagram、facebook、tiktok 與 x 皆屬敏感，而非遭拒絕；其讀取功能在 Auto 模式下持續可用，其寫入功能則受管控。支付類服務（例如 dashboard.stripe.com、coinbase、twilio）、Carta 唯讀投資組合／帳戶資料、預算規劃（ynab），以及通訊軟體的寫入操作，同樣依此軸線分類。

trans-unit.source: The comms / social / content import batch extends this axis. The AI-chat apps (chatgpt, claude) and the microblog / fediverse social apps (bluesky, mastodon, threads) are classified sensitive: their reads run under Auto, their writes (post / send / publish) re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in. This is the conservative default for the category: an unknown social / AI app defaults toward LESS reach, because a mis-classification that read as "safe" would make the app writable-under-Auto (able to post or message on someone's account). These hosts contain no generic category keyword the import-time heuristic flags, so they are classified explicitly on this axis rather than relying on the heuristic to catch them. The discord messaging origin remains sensitive (writes mutating-gated). Media and social origins such as spotify, twitch, steam, youtube, youtube-music, and tinder are sensitive, not denied; their writes are gated and guarded as applicable. netflix and onlyfans remain hard-denied.
trans-unit.target: 通訊／社群／內容匯入批次延伸了此一軸線。AI 聊天應用程式（chatgpt、claude）與微網誌／聯邦宇宙（fediverse）社群應用程式（bluesky、mastodon、threads）皆分類為敏感：其讀取操作於 Auto 模式下執行，其寫入操作（發文／傳送／發布）則會重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制。這是該類別的保守預設值：未知的社群／AI 應用程式預設朝向較低的觸及範圍，因為若誤將其分類為「安全」，將導致該應用程式在 Auto 模式下即可被寫入（能夠以他人帳號發文或傳送訊息）。這些主機不含匯入時期啟發式規則所偵測的通用類別關鍵字，因此改依此軸線明確分類，而非仰賴該啟發式規則加以攔截。discord 通訊來源仍維持敏感分類（寫入操作受變更寫入管控）。媒體與社群類來源，如 spotify、twitch、steam、youtube、youtube-music 與 tinder，皆屬敏感而非遭拒絕；其寫入操作依適用情形受管控與防護。netflix 與 onlyfans 則仍維持硬性拒絕。

trans-unit.source: Independent of this axis, every comms / social / content descriptor the batch imports is DOM-only (the conservative backing default): it is surfaced as a discovery-pending hit, never a confident API-invocable hit, and is never learn-seeded, so a ToS-hostile or AI-chat app is never auto-driven through a fabricated API call from guessed auth.
trans-unit.target: 與此軸線無關，此批次匯入的每一項通訊／社群／內容描述子皆為僅限 DOM（此為保守的後備預設值）：其會被呈現為「探索待處理」命中結果，絕不會呈現為可信賴、可透過 API 呼叫的命中結果，也絕不會作為學習種子使用，因此對服務條款不友善或 AI 聊天類應用程式，絕不會透過猜測所得的驗證資料，被虛構出的 API 呼叫自動驅動執行。

trans-unit.source: Payment / money-movement classification (the commerce / travel / misc batch). The most-sensitive import batch is screened along a payment dimension layered onto these three axes, because a payment-bearing op writable under Auto = money moved without consent (an order placed, a card charged, a paid reservation booked). The classification follows the money:
trans-unit.target: 支付／資金移轉分類（電子商務／旅遊／其他批次）。敏感程度最高的匯入批次，會依附加於前述三項軸線之上的支付維度加以審查，因為在 Auto 模式下可寫入的支付相關操作，即等同於未經同意即完成資金移轉（下單購買、刷卡扣款、完成付費訂位）。此分類方式依循資金流向而定：

trans-unit.source: Payment-bearing commerce / travel / paid-booking origins → sensitive. Food delivery and rideshare (doordash, ubereats, uber, lyft, grubhub, instacart, dominos, chipotle), retail / marketplace checkout (amazon, ebay, etsy, bestbuy, costco, walmart, target, craigslist, shopify), and travel / transport paid bookings (booking, airbnb, expedia, kayak, opentable) are classified sensitive: their reads run under Auto, their writes (place-order / checkout / book) re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in (posture B). This is the conservative default for the category: an unknown commerce / payment app defaults toward LESS reach (sensitive, never safe-writable). opentable is sensitive unconditionally: an OpenTable reservation holds a card, so a held-card / paid reservation is payment-adjacent even when no "checkout" op is present.
trans-unit.target: 涉及支付的電子商務／旅遊／付費訂位來源 → 敏感。外送與共乘服務（doordash、ubereats、uber、lyft、grubhub、instacart、dominos、chipotle），零售／商城結帳（amazon、ebay、etsy、bestbuy、costco、walmart、target、craigslist、shopify），以及旅遊／交通類付費訂位服務（booking、airbnb、expedia、kayak、opentable），皆分類為敏感：其讀取操作於 Auto 模式下執行，其寫入操作（下單／結帳／訂位）則會重新強制執行依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制（立場 B）。這是該類別的保守預設值：未知的電子商務／支付類應用程式預設朝向較低的觸及範圍（歸類為敏感，絕不視為可安全寫入）。opentable 為無條件敏感：由於 OpenTable 的訂位會預先持卡擔保，即使沒有「結帳」操作存在，持卡擔保／付費訂位本身即與支付行為相關聯。

trans-unit.source: Pure money-movement apps → sensitive. Standalone peer-to-peer money-transfer / wallet apps (paypal, venmo, cash app, wise, western union) are sensitive, not hard-denied. Reads are allowed under Auto; mutating actions are gated by the sensitive-origin write path and by the payment-op guard.
trans-unit.target: 純資金移轉類應用程式 → 敏感。獨立的點對點轉帳／電子錢包應用程式（paypal、venmo、cash app、wise、western union）屬敏感，而非硬性拒絕。讀取操作於 Auto 模式下獲准執行；變更寫入類操作則受敏感來源寫入路徑及支付操作防護機制雙重管控。

trans-unit.source: Read-only commerce browsing → safe. Pure-availability or read-only apps whose vendored ops are all reads (calendly availability links, yelp / tripadvisor business search, zillow listings, grafana dashboards) stay safe (unclassified, reads run under Auto). The import-time heuristic's payment tokens are deliberately SPECIFIC (checkout / cart / place-order / charge, NOT a bare order / book / reserve) so a benign commerce read is not false-tripped; a safe commerce origin is added to the read-only-safe invariant set ONLY when its emitted ops are verified read-only.
trans-unit.target: 純瀏覽型電子商務 → 安全。其內建操作皆為純讀取的純查詢或唯讀應用程式（calendly 可預約時段連結、yelp／tripadvisor 商家搜尋、zillow 物件列表、grafana 儀表板），仍維持安全分類（未分類狀態，讀取操作於 Auto 模式下執行）。匯入時期啟發式規則所使用的支付相關關鍵詞刻意採取精確定義（checkout／cart／place-order／charge，而非籠統的 order／book／reserve），以避免良性的電子商務讀取操作遭誤判；一個電子商務來源，唯有在其所發出的操作經驗證確實為純讀取時，才會被加入唯讀安全不變集合中。

trans-unit.source: What makes money-movement-under-Auto impossible is the payment-origin gate, established for this batch before any payment descriptor lands: (a) payment origins are sensitive (posture-B gated); (b) an import-time payment-op CI guard fails the build if any payment-bearing op (checkout / pay / place_order / charge / complete_booking / buy_tickets / book_flight / request_ride / place_bid / create_order / ...) is ever classified on an ungated origin. A payment write therefore can only flow on a sensitive origin, where the per-origin mutating opt-in re-gates it, or not ship at all.
trans-unit.target: 使在 Auto 模式下移轉資金成為不可能的機制，是在任何支付相關描述子加入之前，即為此批次建立的支付來源閘門：(a) 支付類來源皆屬敏感（受立場 B 管控）；(b) 一項匯入時期的支付操作 CI 防護機制會在任何涉及支付的操作（checkout／pay／place_order／charge／complete_booking／buy_tickets／book_flight／request_ride／place_bid／create_order／……）被分類於未受管控來源時，使建置失敗。因此，支付類寫入操作只能在敏感來源上流動（由依來源之變更寫入選擇加入機制重新加以管控），否則便無法出貨上線。

trans-unit.source: The hard-denial axis makes an origin non-enableable; the sensitivity axes keep an origin usable but re-apply write-time friction. An import-time classification gate fails the build if a sensitivity-suspect origin is left unclassified, so a gap in the classification can never silently read as "allow".
trans-unit.target: 硬性拒絕軸線使一個來源無法啟用；敏感性軸線則使來源維持可用狀態，但重新套用寫入時的管控摩擦。若某一具敏感疑慮的來源未經分類，匯入時期的分類閘門會使建置失敗，因此分類上的缺漏絕不可能被默默視為「允許」。

trans-unit.source: Server-delivered and learned recipes (a future capability) are untrusted data and must be signature-verified before they can bind to a credentialed call. Verification uses Ed25519 over the RFC-8785 JCS canonical form of the recipe provenance envelope, performed inside the interpreter after schema validation and before binding. A tampered or unsigned non-bundled recipe is rejected with a typed RECIPE_SIGNATURE_INVALID reason. Verification fails closed: if the platform cannot perform Ed25519 verification, a non-bundled recipe is rejected rather than trusted.
trans-unit.target: 由伺服器提供及經學習取得的配方（未來能力）皆屬不受信任的資料，必須先經過簽章驗證，才能繫結至具憑證的呼叫。驗證機制係針對配方來源信封（provenance envelope）之 RFC-8785 JCS 標準化形式，使用 Ed25519 進行驗證，於直譯器內部、在結構描述驗證之後、繫結之前執行。遭竄改或未簽章的非隨附配方，會被回報一個具型別的 RECIPE_SIGNATURE_INVALID 原因並遭拒絕。驗證機制採故障時預設關閉：若平台無法執行 Ed25519 驗證，非隨附配方將遭拒絕，而非被逕予信任。

trans-unit.source: First-party bundled recipes (shipped and reviewed with the extension) are trusted-by-provenance and exempt from the verify gate, so the bundled capability head is unaffected. The trusted public key ships in the extension bundle; it is never fetched remotely. The private signing key is offline.
trans-unit.target: 第一方隨附配方（隨擴充功能一併出貨並經審查）屬依來源即受信任，並豁免於驗證閘門之外，因此隨附的能力主體不受影響。受信任的公開金鑰隨擴充功能包一併出貨；絕不會透過遠端擷取取得。私密簽章金鑰則離線保存。

trans-unit.source: For questions about this posture or FSB's data handling, open an issue on the project's GitHub repository.
trans-unit.target: 如對本立場或 FSB 的資料處理方式有任何疑問，請於本專案的 GitHub 儲存庫中開啟一則議題（issue）。

trans-unit.source: FSB's automation posture, consent model, audit-log retention policy, and service-denylist rationale.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的自動化立場、同意機制模型、稽核記錄保留政策，以及服務拒絕清單的理由依據。
